templates.name: GitHub Directory Download
templates.description: Adds a download button to GitHub directory views, allowing you to download individual directories as ZIP files without cloning the entire repository. Uses the GitHub API to fetch and package directory contents.
templates.author: Browser Automata

scripts.name: GitHub Directory Download
scripts.description: Injects a download button into GitHub directory listings. Fetches directory contents via the GitHub API and packages them into a ZIP file using JSZip loaded from CDN.
